strategy_notes: Localized 6 object clusters from agentview world_00.npy (z>0.02). First Pi0 attempt with 'pick up the bbq sauce' (from home) picked the WRONG object (tomato sauce can, gripper gap 0.063m; image diff showed center-front can disappeared). After reset, identified target via wrist-cam crop: BBQ sauce is the brown bottle at agentview cluster pixel (r108,c109), world xy=(-0.20,-0.08), top z=0.115. Carried via waypoint (-0.10,0.10,0.22) to (0.04,0.27,0.22), descended to z=0.17, released. Basket center xy=(+0.04,+0.27), rim z=0.13 from agentview cluster 5.
